title: More Swords Plus+
description: This modification adds many swords with different abilities, some of them will give you effects
body:
This modification adds many swords with different abilities, some of them will give you effects, others will lift the enemy up when hit, attack him with lightning or even spawn blocks/mobs at the place of impact. If you want to add action to your world, then this mod is perfect for you, because it will add interest to your adventures!

❗RECIPES ALL SWORDS❗:

Cactus Sword = 2x Cactus & 1x Stick

Ender Sword = 2x Ender Pearl, 2x Amethyst & 1x Stick

Fire Sword = 2x Blaze Rod, 2x Blaze Powder & 1x Stick

Glowing Sword = 2x Glowstone, 2x Glowstone Dust & 1x Stick

Dynamite Sword = 2x Dynamite, 2x Redstone & 1x Stick

Cobweb Sword = 6x String, 2x Iron Ingot & 1x Stick

Sea Sword = 3x Diamond, 1x Heart Of The Sea, 2x Gold Ingot & 1x Stick

Angel Sword = 1x Iron Block, 1x Diamond, 2x Feather, 2x Gold Ingot & 1x Stick

Electric Sword = 1x Nether Star, 3x Diamond, 2x Iron Ingot & 1x Stick

Emerald Sword = 2x Emerald, 2x Iron Ingot & 1x Stick

Coal Sword = 2x Any Coal (Thanks MCreator Now Air:), 1x Iron Ingot, 1x Iron Nugget & 1x Stick

Guital Sword = 1x Dark Oak Planks, 1x Note Block, 1x Iron Ingot, 1x Iron Nugget & 1x Stick

Glass Sword = 2x Glass & 1x Stick

New Year Sword = 1x Nether Star, 2x Gold Ingot, 1x Spruse Sapling, 1x Diamond, 1x Emerald, 2x Redstone & 1x Stick

Divine Sword = 2x Nether Star, 1x Diamond Block, 3x Gold Ingot, 1x Experience Bottle, 1x Amethyst & 1x Stick

Ancient Sword = 1x Nether Star, 2x Iron Block, 1x Experience Bottle, 1x Lapis, 1x Carved Pumpkin
2x Gold Ingot & 1x Stick

Leather Sword = 2x Leather, 1x Iron Ingot, 1x Iron Nugget & 1x Stick

Dark Sword = 2x Echo Shard, 2x Diamond & 1x Stick.
